label: Stat part (food level)
description: Scales the stat based on the pawn's current food level.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

factorStarving.label: Factor (starving)
factorStarving.description: Stat multiplier when the pawn is starving.

factorUrgentlyHungry.label: Factor (urgently hungry)
factorUrgentlyHungry.description: Stat multiplier when the pawn is urgently hungry.

factorHungry.label: Factor (hungry)
factorHungry.description: Stat multiplier when the pawn is hungry.

factorFed.label: Factor (fed)
factorFed.description: Stat multiplier when the pawn is fed.
